items.title: Base58
items.description: A Bitcoin protocol education organization offering intensive, in-person bootcamps focused on Bitcoin Core, transactions, and protocol fundamentals. Named after the Base58Check encoding scheme used in Bitcoin addresses.

items.title: Bitcoin Commons
items.description: Community space and event venue in Austin, Texas, focused on Bitcoin education, networking, and public discourse.

items.title: Bitcoin Education
items.description: Overview of Bitcoin education resources, curricula, and pedagogical approaches for developers, users, and educators across technical and non-technical audiences.

items.title: Hodl Up
items.description: Bitcoin mining-themed board game. Teaches proof-of-work concepts, mining economics, and hodling strategy through physical gameplay.

items.title: PlebDevs
items.description: A Bitcoin developer education initiative founded by Austin (@bitcoinplebdev) that teaches plebs to become technical builders on Bitcoin, Lightning, and Nostr. Operates out of PlebLab in Austin, TX.

items.title: PlebLab
items.description: PlebLab is an Austin-based Bitcoin education initiative home to PlebDevs, a program that teaches Lightning and Bitcoin app development to beginners.

items.title: RaspiBlitz
items.description: RaspiBlitz is a DIY Bitcoin Lightning node project built for education. Unlike commercial plug-and-play nodes, it emphasizes learning the underlying tools.
